sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18889" key="a)yi/nqinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀψίνθ-ινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n18889.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flavoured with wormwood,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔλαιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
